statement.informal: `specular` satisfies its @verify contract: under preconditions (k_specular >= 0.0 ∧ k_specular <= ONE ∧ r_dot_v_clamped >= 0.0 ∧ r_dot_v_clamped <= ONE ∧ shininess >= SHININESS_MIN ∧ shininess <= SHININESS_MAX ∧ light_specular >= 0.0 ∧ light_specular <= ONE), the function's result satisfies (True). This is the obligation Forge ships to a Lean target for DO-178C / IEC-61508 / ISO-26262 certification evidence.
statement.formal_lean:

-- theorem phong_specular_below_ks_times_is : ∀ args, (k_specular >= 0.0 ∧ k_specular <= ONE ∧ r_dot_v_clamped >= 0.0 ∧ r_dot_v_clamped <= ONE ∧ shininess >= SHININESS_MIN ∧ shininess <= SHININESS_MAX ∧ light_specular >= 0.0 ∧ light_specular <= ONE) → (True) := sorry
